precall.title: How do we start?

precall.outgoingSubtitle: Outbound · dial the patient number referred by the law firm

precall.incomingNoteText: Incoming calls are detected automatically and appear as a notification at the top right · click 'Answer' from there.
precall.searchPlaceholder: Name, phone, email, or code PT-...
precall.noPatientSubtitle: New patient? Go back and choose 'I'm going to call' or the manual entry option.
precall.minChars: Type at least 2 characters to search
precall.noPhoneWarning: ⚠ This patient has no phone on file. Update their profile first.
precall.manualPhoneHint: Optional if data arrived by email or fax
precall.manualNote: No call timer · case is created as law firm referral. You can complete all details in the next step.
precall.outgoingDialHint: You will dial this number on confirm

newCase.dialogDescription: The timer starts when you are actually speaking with the patient
newCase.captureTitle: Information to capture on this call
newCase.patientHint: "Can I confirm your full name and date of birth? Who referred you to Precision Medical?"
newCase.accidentNotesPlaceholder: Rear-end · 3 vehicles · patient reported cervical pain
newCase.accidentHint: "When did the accident happen? How did it occur?"
newCase.lawyerHint: "Does the patient have an attorney or law firm representing them?"
newCase.lawyerNoteHas: Central firm catalog · if not listed, use 'Add new firm' for quick creation. Edson will later verify representation with the attorney.
newCase.lawyerNoteSeeking: Patient has no attorney yet. Edson will review and may suggest PI firms. Case stays in pre-intake until representation is confirmed.
newCase.lawyerNoteDeclined: No attorney = no lien. The patient must understand treatment is billed directly (cash or own insurance). Confirm before continuing.
newCase.policyHint: "Do you already have a PIP claim number?"
newCase.scheduleHint: "Let me find an available slot. Does tomorrow or later this week work for you?"
newCase.confirmBySMS: "Does that work? We'll confirm by SMS."
newCase.noScheduleNote: Not scheduling on this call. Case stays in NEW_REFERRAL and will need to be scheduled later ("Schedule" button in queue).
newCase.formDeliveryDesc: The receptionist can choose when to send the patient-facing form:
newCase.sendNowDesc: SMS + email · patient fills from home
newCase.tabletDesc: We hand them a tablet when they arrive
newCase.summaryTitle: At the end of the call, the system will
newCase.summaryConfirmed: Case moves to CONFIRMED status · appointment confirmed
newCase.summaryAppointmentSMS: Appointment confirmation sent to patient by SMS + email
newCase.summaryForm: Public form sent with tokenized link (30 days)
newCase.summaryEdson: Edson receives the case to verify with {firm}
newCase.summaryCal: Appointment appears on doctor's calendar · reminders 24h and 2h before
newCase.summaryAudit: Full summary logged in case history ({elapsed})
newCase.errorRequired: Complete all required fields marked with *
newCase.outgoingConfirmHint: On confirm the timer starts · you can edit the name, add email, date of birth, etc.
